clinical_validity.rationale: The adversarial pass forces specialty and bias review for each case rather than accepting generated case-bank breadth as validity.

psychometric_defensibility.rationale: Score-use blockers, blueprint linkage, and pilot debrief data are required before learner-consequence claims.

technical_feasibility.rationale: The red team narrows phase 1 to deterministic, optimized, device-gated runtime behavior.

architecture_coherence.rationale: The counterplan preserves the adapter and registry architecture while adding gates rather than redesigning the system.

security_privacy.rationale: Provider benchmark and retention gates strengthen the privacy posture, though formal controls remain future work.

ux_workflow_fit.rationale: Review workflow burden is now explicit and matched to admin UX needs.

cost_performance_efficiency.rationale: No-live-generation, B1 orchestration, and text fallback reduce early cost and latency risk.

open_source_sustainability.rationale: The asset ingestion gate and blocklist directly address copyleft contamination risk.

market_gtm_strength.rationale: The counterplan favors a credible formative training product over a risky high-stakes replacement story.

evidence_discipline.rationale: Every major capability now has an evidence gate before claims or dependency lock.

implementation_readiness.rationale: The narrowed first milestone is easier to implement and test.

adversarial_robustness.rationale: The red team identified and patched the largest feasibility, licensing, provider, and score-use risks.

legal_regulatory_resilience.rationale: License, score-use, provider, and claims gates improve legal resilience.

specialty_clinical_generalizability.rationale: The plan scales across specialties only through reviewer-gated case families.

critical_risks.summary: Reviewer throughput could become the bottleneck if scenario generation outpaces clinical, psychometric, legal, and simulation QA capacity.
Speech/voice latency could make the XR experience feel broken even if text dialogue works.

evidence_debt.summary: Run an end-to-end Quest 3 station smoke with optimized placeholder assets and WebSocket control events.

decision_debt.summary: Approve the asset registry license blocklist before importing any third-party character or texture assets.

summary: The adversarial team accepts the direction only with strict phase-1 runtime, license, provider, device, and score-use gates.
